reviews.review_description: when i try to play a song it doesnt play and everytime i play something it says "spotify can’t play this right now” then after it says that it will skip to another song doesnt play that and it does it for about 5 or 6 songs then it’ll finally play one but when it does it plays for 9 SECONDS THEN IT STOPS PLAYING and when i say that i mean  it completely doesnt play sound for the rest of the song and if i try to pause it then unpause it when i pause it stops playing it and i can’t play it and when i chose a different song IT DOES THE SAME THING AGAIN. spotify please fix this annoying bug or whatever this is.

They fixed the crashing issue (as far as I can tell) but even then HOW DO YOU LET YOURSELF GET OUT DONE BY AMAZON MUSIC?! Amazon Music has a lovely feature where you can balance the music and game audio to your liking, with Spotify, you can’t. They implemented that exact feature for Xbox, why not actually put some effort into the app instead of just sending you to the browser. We waited for forever, having to  use Spotify on the browser while we begged Spotify to add an app to meta quest, then they finally listened and IT STILL IS JUST THE BROWSER. And I’m not exaggerating, it not only is just the Spotify web browser page but if you minimize the window on quest, IT SHOWS UP AS “browser” WITH THE ICON, NAME AND EVERYTHING. Anyway, I’d suggest just using Spotify on your mobile device or if you plan on using a free version or purchasing a music service specifically for your quest, go with Amazon Music (god, I can’t believe I just typed that)

It’s really good but one thing is that if you play a song sometimes it will just go without no music and then starts playing it like 10 seconds after you play the song and sometimes you have to try and play this song over again because it just doesn’t play overall it’s a great app though I request you should get this 
￼

It is a good app sometimes I have to go to the menu and press play for the song I want because it doesn't play after the one before it. It might be my headset because i got it a while ago but it also might be a bug or glitch. But besides that good app . Fix this bug tho

I have been recently using this app to listen but I have had a little problem with searching up songs because whenever I search up the songs I press on it it changes to a completely different song like I was trying to listen to Melanie Martinez but it changed up to a Sabrina Carpenter song which is not the music that I pressed on, but I guess I’ll listen to any music so like I’m fine with that but yeah sometimes makes me mad so I just gave it like a three star review because this is the only thing I could like listen to music on without having to not be able to play games on my VR without the music turning off

With the app open, it’s the exact same layout as the web version of Spotify, although it’s slow, laggy, and sometimes unresponsive. Okay, whatever, I’ll deal with it. 

Once a song plays you can minimise the app to get media controls when your meta menu’s open. Cool. 

But then you launch a full VR app, and the music pauses for a second, weird, but whatever. 

But the second your VR game starts to get even slightly big, your music stops. You open Spotify to see what happens, only to find the app has crashed.
Your music’s stopped and your app’s back to looking like how it did when you first opened it. 
You’ll see, (like usual in Spotify), that your current song’s at the bottom of the screen, 
which is something. But seriously, an app that crashes the second the device it’s on gets used for what it’s made for? 

The constant crashing, slow response times, and terrible troubles easily make this the worst Spotify experience yet.

First it’s slow, it’s very slow, it’s fine to use a little bit of processing power to use this app, if I can call it that because secondly it’s just the web version, it’s super bad, it uses no processing power because its web and because it sucks, third bugs, it sometimes doesn’t let me skip songs so I have to re open the app, it doesn’t automatically play the next song when I’m in a call. Conclusion, I won’t use this much but my phone instead, some people cant because they don’t have earbuds or premium, as a company I thought you’d do better but hopefully you can redeem yourself

Don't get all the negative reviews. It's a bit laggy but that's expected and it usually sorts out within a couple minutes of using it due to it still loading. The music comes through clearly, it isn't buggy at all and you can play it in the background whilst playing games if you turn it on through your settings (which SOME of the people complaining clearly did not do). Other than that, app works great and it was easy to log in ✌️.

reviews.review_title: Works sometimes, for a little bit
reviews.review_description: To start off, it’s a hassle to get music to start playing. You have to wait for everything to load for a few minutes or it will crash when you try and play a song. And, anytime you leave a game, there’s a lag spike in your game, or you go in pass through for a second it will crash, and you have to repeat the whole process. This includes leaving your boundary. Also, sometimes it will just crash randomly, even if none of that stuff happens. Really annoying but it somewhat works.
